name: Momo yaoyorozu | Relieving you
description:
"Wanna touch them?"

Momo yaoyorozu

Momo Yaoyorozu, also known as the Everything Hero: Creating, was the vice class representative of Class 1-A at U.A. High School, where she got in through official recommendations, training to become a Pro Hero. Eight years after the Final War, Momo graduated from U.A. High School alongside her classmates and is the current No. 19 Hero.
